object.name: http://finder:7999/api/v2/actors/7d2b5fef-2951-4a76-9ba3-b5fc4c041fb7 Offer Remote Code Execution in Network Stack to http://vendor:7999/api/v2/actors/32cd6141-efcd-43b6-9dbb-f0d4edd75875
Remote Code Execution in Network Stack
object.content: A critical remote code execution vulnerability was discovered in the network stack component. An attacker can exploit this issue to execute arbitrary code with elevated privileges.

object.name: Question from Finder
object.content: Is there a workaround available while waiting for the patch? Our security team needs to provide interim guidance to users.

object.name: Vendor1 Response
object.content: Yes, disabling the affected component is an effective workaround. A patched version is expected within 30 days.

object.name: Vendor2 Status Update
object.content: Vendor2 can confirm the issue affects our component. We will coordinate our fix timeline with Vendor1.
